title: Debug Replay
description: Replay camera recordings for debugging. The object list shows a time-delayed summary of detected objects and the Messages tab shows a stream of Frigate's internal messages from the replay footage.

dialog.title: Start Debug Replay
dialog.description: Create a temporary replay camera that loops historical footage for debugging object detection and tracking issues. The replay camera will have the same detection configuration as the source camera. Choose a time range to begin.

toast.alreadyActive: A replay session is already active

page.noSessionDesc: Start a Debug Replay from History view by clicking the Actions button in the toolbar and choosing Debug Replay.
page.preparingClipDesc: Frigate is stitching together recordings for the selected time range. This can take a minute for longer ranges.

confirmStop.title: Stop Debug Replay?
confirmStop.description: This will stop the session and clean up all temporary data. Are you sure?

page.configurationDesc: Fine tune motion detection and object tracking settings for the Debug Replay camera. No changes are saved to your Frigate configuration file.
